message:
The other day, my dog, Charlie, decided that the best time to practice his escape artist skills was during a thunderstorm. There I was, in the middle of a family group chat, trying to rally my troops while dodging raindrops and a very determined pup. 

"Anyone seen Charlie?" my sister texted, while my husband sent a string of dog emojis. I could practically hear my mom laughing in the background as she chimed in with, "If he’s anything like my cat, he’s probably under the bed!" 

After a few frantic minutes, we finally found him—hiding behind the couch, shaking like a leaf. It was a sweet reminder that even in moments of chaos, laughter and teamwork make everything just a little easier. 

This little refresher helped me think about how important it is to have a plan for our furry friends during storms (or any unexpected moments). How do you keep your pets calm during rough weather?
